subject: fix(ui): consistent styling in LayoutTab Structure controls
body:
Remove dead ternary in delete cell label, use DaisyUI btn classes
for Duplicate and Reset buttons instead of raw Tailwind, and change
cell size slider to range-secondary to match cell-level color theme.

Tags: ui, layout, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: structure-tab
Semver: patch
